zh.Isle of Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭音巴內-爾易斯爾 本 斯凱
zh.Stralachlan, Argyll, Scotland: 蘇格蘭阿吉爾斯特拉拉倫
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lachlan Royal MacKinnon於1126年出生在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾斯凱時，他的父親Chief Donald MacKinnon27歲，母親Mrs Donald MacKinnon27歲。他於大約1149年與Mrs. Lachlan MacKinnon在蘇格蘭阿吉爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1216年在他的家鄉享年90歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾斯凱。

zh-hans.Isle of Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland: 苏格兰音巴內-爾易斯爾 本 斯凱
zh-hans.Stralachlan, Argyll, Scotland: 苏格兰阿吉爾斯特拉拉倫
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lachlan Royal MacKinnon于1126年出生在苏格兰音巴內-爾斯凱时，他的父亲Chief Donald MacKinnon27岁，母亲Mrs Donald MacKinnon27岁。他于大约1149年与Mrs. Lachlan MacKinnon在苏格兰阿吉爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1216年在他的家乡享年90岁，埋葬在苏格兰音巴內-爾斯凱。

nameMeanings.name: MacKinnon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McKinnon
meanings: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhionghuin, a patronymic from a Gaelic personal name meaning ‘fair born’ or ‘fair son’ (compare Kevin ).
the name has also been ‘translated’ as Love , and has been taken as being from Gaelic Mac Ionmhuinn ‘son of the beloved one’.

nameMeanings.name: Lachlan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Scottish Gaelic Lachlann (earlier Lochlann), said to refer originally to a migrant from Norway, the ‘land of the lochs’. The name was traditionally used only in families with some Highlands connection and still retains a very Scottish flavour. However, it has now acquired wide popular appeal, especially in Australia and New Zealand.

variants.name: Lachlann
meanings: From Scottish Gaelic Lachlann (earlier Lochlann), said to refer originally to a migrant from Norway, the ‘land of the lochs’. The name was traditionally used only in families with some Highlands connection and still retains a very Scottish flavour. However, it has now acquired wide popular appeal, especially in Australia and New Zealand.

nameMeanings.name: Royal
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mainly U.S.: name derived from the modern English adjective (from Old French leial, from Latin legalis ‘legal’).

en.lifeSummary: When Lachlan Royal MacKinnon was born in 1126, in Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland, his father, Chief Donald MacKinnon, was 27 and his mother, Mrs Donald MacKinnon, was 27. He married Mrs. Lachlan MacKinnon about 1149, in Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1216, in his hometown, at the age of 90, and was buried in Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lachlan Royal MacKinnon est né en 1126, à Skye, Inverness-shire, Écosse, son père, Chief Donald MacKinnon, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mrs Donald MacKinnon, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Lachlan MacKinnon environ 1149, à Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1216, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 90 ans, et a été enterré à Skye, Inverness-shire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lachlan Royal MacKinnon 1126 in Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Chief Donald MacKinnon 27 und seine Mutter Mrs Donald MacKinnon 27. Er hat um 1149 in Argyll, Scotland Mrs. Lachlan MacKinnon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1216 im Alter von 90 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lachlan Royal MacKinnon è nato il nel 1126 nel Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland, il suo padre, Chief Donald MacKinnon, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Donald MacKinnon, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Mrs. Lachlan MacKinnon circa 1149, nel Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1216, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 90 anni, e fu sepolto a Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lachlan Royal MacKinnonが1126年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアスクイで生まれた時，父Chief Donald MacKinnonは27歳，母Mrs Donald MacKinnonは27歳であった。約1149年にスコットランドアルグイルでMrs. Lachlan MacKinnonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1216年に故郷で90歳で死去し，スコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアスクイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lachlan Royal MacKinnon(이)가 1126년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 스카이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Chief Donald MacKinnon(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Donald MacKinnon(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1149년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 Mrs. Lachlan MacKinnon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1216년 그의 고향에서 90세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 스카이에 묻혔다.

mn.Isle of Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland: Isle of Skye, Siorrachd Inbhir Nis, Шотланд

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lachlan Royal MacKinnon nasceu em 1126, em Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland, seu pai, Chief Donald MacKinnon, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Donald MacKinnon, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Lachlan MacKinnon aproximadamente 1149, em Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1216, em sua cidade natal, com 90 anos, e foi sepultado em Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lachlan Royal MacKinnon родился в 1126 г. в местности ски, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Chief Donald MacKinnon было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Donald MacKinnon, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Lachlan MacKinnon около 1149 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1216 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 90 лет и был похоронен в местности ски, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lachlan Royal MacKinnon nació en 1126, en Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland, su papá, Chief Donald MacKinnon, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Mrs Donald MacKinnon, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Mrs. Lachlan MacKinnon aproximadamente 1149, en Argyll, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1216, en su pueblo, a la edad de 90 años, y fue sepultado en Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland.
